name: Eduardo Cazangi
title: Tech Lead | Senior Software Engineer
subtitle: Java · AWS · Microservices · High-Availability Systems
summary: Java Software Engineer since 2011, specializing in APIs, microservices, and the architecture of scalable and high-availability services. Solid experience with integrations, performance tuning, and building robust backend solutions. Also worked as Tech Lead, leading squads and driving important technical decisions. Hands-on experience with AWS, Kafka, and Kubernetes in distributed, resilient systems designed for high-traffic environments.

highlights: Technical leadership and architectural decisions for mission-critical systems
Squad coordination and engineering best practices
Built investment recommendation and classification systems serving millions of customers
Developed core platform behind Nubank's Money Boxes product (savings with 100% CDI, multi-country)
Acted as both backend and frontend developer in highly cross-functional, international teams
Collaborated directly with investment specialists, product managers, designers, and data analysts
Led the Transactional Integrity team — monitoring and consistency of all financial transactions
Technical point of contact between engineering, product, and business stakeholders
Facilitated Agile ceremonies: sprint planning, refinements, reviews, retrospectives
Managed prioritization of technical initiatives and tech debt in high-volume transaction environments
Developed Sentinela — real-time transaction monitoring platform processing hundreds of millions of messages/day
Built Accounting Derivation System for regulatory reporting and financial statements
Implemented failure detection and alerting mechanisms for critical financial flows
Led architecture and technical design for new strategic systems at Benevix (Health Plan Administrator)
Conducted code reviews, established engineering best practices
Primary technical liaison between stakeholders and the engineering team
Consultant for Benevix (Health Plan Administrator) — legacy and new system development
Supported legacy healthcare systems for CNU (Health Insurance Operator) in regulated environment

experience.company: Benevix Administradora de Planos de Saúde
highlights: Led technical decisions across multiple mission-critical systems for healthcare plan administration
Ensured system reliability, scalability, and long-term maintainability
